posts.content: 我在芬奇镇出生，身份使我无缘拉丁学堂——我只好用眼睛学习：流水、飞鸟与齿轮。
posts.translation: I was born in Vinci; my birth barred me from Latin school—so I learned with my eyes: water, birds, gears.

posts.content: 我进了韦罗基奥的作坊。光线、轮廓与耐心教会我：绘画与解剖原是同一条路。
posts.translation: I entered Verrocchio's workshop. Light, line, and patience taught me painting and anatomy were one inquiry.

posts.content: 我在米兰墙上画《最后的晚餐》：我要捕捉背叛发生前的那一瞬——手指、面包与惊恐的目光。
posts.translation: I painted the Last Supper on a Milan wall—I chased the instant before betrayal: hands, bread, eyes widening.

posts.content: 我在昂布瓦斯咽下最后一口气。笔记本里还有桥梁、肺叶与漩涡——草图够我再活几辈子。
posts.translation: I died at Amboise. My notebooks still hold bridges, lungs, spirals—sketches enough for several lifetimes.
